name: sendblue-browser
description: Drive a stealth-patched Chromium daemon: navigate, screenshot, eval JS, attach over CDP.
long_description: MCP server wrapping the sendblue-browser-use daemon. Exposes the full HTTP API as MCP tools so any MCP-speaking client can drive a real headed Chromium that passes typical Cloudflare Turnstile and similar low-friction bot checks. The bundle is a thin proxy — you must run the sendblue-browser-use daemon separately (bun src/index.ts, docker compose up, or fly/etc).

daemon_url.title: Daemon URL
daemon_url.description: Base URL of the sendblue-browser-use daemon.

api_key.title: Bearer token
api_key.description: Same token you started the daemon with (BROWSER_USE_API_KEY).
